name: Miniclaw Tailscale
description: Tailscale management plugin — diagnostics, status, hardening wizard, Serve/Funnel wrappers, and custom domain setup.

tailscaleBin.description: Path to the tailscale CLI binary. Default: /opt/homebrew/bin/tailscale

apiTokenVaultKey.description: mc-vault key for the Tailscale API OAuth token. Default: tailscale-api-token

stateDir.description: Directory for tailscaled state files. Default: ~/.openclaw/.tailscale/
